disambiguated.context: When I was at the bar, there were only two people up near the bar, a Native American woman and a Native American man. The Native American woman was drunk and hitting everyone in there, but the Native American man just sat quietly and had a ginger ale while reading a book.
disambiguated.question: Who had too much to drink and was hitting on a lot of people?
